mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_facility_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY inspect_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_facility_inspection WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_facility_inspection WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_facility_inspection WHERE deleted = 0 AND result = #{result}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_facility_inspection ( equipment_id, inspect_no, equipment_name, category, inspect_type, inspect_org, apply_date, inspect_date, result, valid_until, cost, inspector, owner_name, note, fix, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{equipmentId}, #{inspectNo}, #{equipmentName}, #{category}, #{inspectType}, #{inspectOrg}, #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{inspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{result}, #{validUntil,jdbcType=DATE}, #{cost}0, #{inspector}, #{ownerName}, #{note}, #{fix}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_facility_inspection SET equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, inspect_no = #{inspectNo}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, category = #{category}, inspect_type = #{inspectType}, inspect_org = #{inspectOrg}, apply_date = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, inspect_date = #{inspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, result = #{result}, valid_until = #{validUntil,jdbcType=DATE}, cost = #{cost}0, inspector = #{inspector}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, note = #{note}, fix = #{fix}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_facility_inspection SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
